title: 有馬記念の後に・振り向かぬ背

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder performs very well at the Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Yeah! You ran like a champ today, Grass Wonder!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
You really are the Beast's Successor! I'm sure
Maruzensky's watching you like a hawk!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
choice_data_list: That was a great race, Grass.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for the kind words... Still, I can't help
but feel like it wasn't enough.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: This race should have been more...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I see how it is.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Man, hearing that kinda stings. Seeing as I pretty
much gave it my all just now.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...It sucks losing to someone who didn't even
consider me worth racing.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Haha. But, it is what it is. Guess I wasn't good
enough.
